Terms

Last upadated on Thu Dec 21

1. Introduction

Welcome to Hobbinomicon (the “Website”). By accessing or using our Website, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service (the “Terms”). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use our Website.

2. Purpose of the Website

The primary purpose of Hobbinomicon is to serve as a news and resource platform for tabletop role-playing games, wargames, and scale modeling hobbies. We offer products related to this service and provide subscription accounts to our users.

3. Subscriptions and Products

Subscriptions: Users may subscribe to our services. Subscriptions can be cancelled at any time by contacting our support team at support@hobbinomicon.com or via your account portal.

Products: We offer physical products related to tabletop gaming and hobbies. We do not offer refunds on physical products but will replace any products that are damaged or lost during shipping. Please contact support@hobbinomicon.com for assistance with any product issues.

4. User Responsibilities and Obligations

By using our Website, you agree to:

  • Provide Accurate Information: Ensure that any information you provide to us is accurate, complete, and current.
  • Maintain Confidentiality: Keep your account information, including your password, confidential and secure.
  • Use the Website Lawfully: Use our Website in accordance with all applicable laws and regulations, including United States and Virginia laws.
  • Respect Others: Refrain from using our Website to harass, abuse, or harm other users.
  • Avoid Prohibited Content: Not post or share any content that is unlawful, offensive, defamatory, discriminatory, or infringes on the rights of others.
  • Respect Intellectual Property: Not use, copy, distribute, or share content from our Website without proper authorization.

5. User-Generated Content

Users are responsible for any content they post or share on our Website. By posting content, you agree to:

  • Ownership and Rights: Ensure that you own or have the necessary rights and permissions to share the content.
  • Prohibited Content: Not post content that is obscene, hateful, threatening, or otherwise violates any laws or our Terms.
  • Moderation: Understand that we reserve the right to remove any content that violates these Terms or is deemed inappropriate at our discretion.

6. Dispute Resolution

Any disputes or complaints regarding our services or products should be directed to support@hobbinomicon.com. We will make every effort to resolve your concerns promptly and fairly.

7. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Hobbinomicon and its affiliates, officers, directors, employees, and agents shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues, whether incurred directly or indirectly, or any loss of data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from:

  • Your use of our services or products;
  • Any unauthorized access to or use of our servers and/or any personal information stored therein;
  • Any interruption or cessation of transmission to or from our services;
  • Any bugs, viruses, trojan horses, or the like that may be transmitted to or through our services by any third party;
  • Any errors or omissions in any content or for any loss or damage incurred as a result of the use of any content posted, emailed, transmitted, or otherwise made available through the services; and/or
  • The defamatory, offensive, or illegal conduct of any third party.

8. Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new Terms on our Website. Your continued use of our Website following the posting of changes constitutes your acceptance of such changes.

9. Contact Us

If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at support@hobbinomicon.com.
